image_n.Description: Image number (step number) within a sequence (1-4)

catch_trial.Description: Whether not this image was from a catch trial

catch_on.Description: Whether this was the image within the sequence during which the catch probe onset

catch_outcome.Description: Behavioural outcome in response to catch trial

Levels.false_alarm: Responded to a trial either before catch probe onset or in absence of any catch probe
